prompts.name: Image-to-Image Consistency
prompts.text: Preserve the original subject identity, major shapes, pose logic, and key design elements while improving detail and lighting.

prompts.name: Character Turnaround
prompts.text: Keep character identity, hairstyle, outfit, colors, accessories, and proportions consistent across different angles or views.

prompts.name: LoRA Dataset Clean
prompts.text: Create a clean character-focused image suitable for training, with clear subject visibility, simple background, accurate outfit, and minimal clutter.

prompts.name: LoRA Face Focus
prompts.text: Focus on clear face details, hairstyle, eyes, and key identity traits with strong lighting and minimal background distraction.

prompts.name: LoRA Full Body
prompts.text: Show the full character clearly from head to toe with outfit, shoes, body proportions, and silhouette readable.

prompts.name: Style Test
prompts.text: Use a straightforward composition that tests style, lighting, texture, face quality, hands, and overall model behavior.

prompts.name: Prompt Expansion
prompts.text: Expand a short idea into a complete image prompt by adding subject detail, setting, lighting, mood, camera, and finish.

prompts.name: Prompt Cleanup
prompts.text: Clean up messy prompt input by removing duplicates, fixing contradictions, and improving the order of visual instructions.

prompts.name: Variation Prompt
prompts.text: Create a variation that preserves the original concept but changes lighting, pose, setting, or mood in a controlled way.

prompts.name: Pose Test
prompts.text: Use a clear pose-focused composition that tests body anatomy, hands, silhouette, and clothing movement.

prompts.name: Lighting Test
prompts.text: Use a lighting-focused composition that tests exposure, shadow quality, face readability, and material response.

prompts.name: Background Test
prompts.text: Use a background-focused composition that tests environment detail, depth, lighting integration, and subject separation.

prompts.name: Expression Test
prompts.text: Use a face-focused composition that tests emotion, eyes, mouth, skin detail, and expression readability.

prompts.name: Outfit Test
prompts.text: Use an outfit-focused composition that tests fabric folds, accessories, materials, full silhouette, and design consistency.

prompts.name: Negative Test
prompts.text: Apply cleanup guidance to reduce bad anatomy, unwanted text, artifacts, clutter, poor lighting, and duplicate elements.
